On the monday.com board with id 1234567890, find up to 50 items by matching
exact column values:

  - the "text" column (column id: "text") equals "This is a text column"
  - AND the "country" column (column id: "country") is either "US" or "IL"

Use the dedicated top-level endpoint that searches a single board's items by a
list of column-id / column-values pairs (each entry pairs a column id with the
list of accepted values for that column).

Return the pagination cursor and, for each item, its id and name.
